narrative:
Hudson 2-E (precinct in Summit County) has 1,208 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
